experiment: DOMEX-NK-S460: Frontier-closure classifier refresh S462 + orient.py wiring
expect: Refresh classifier from S458 baseline. Wire section_closeable_frontiers into orient.py. Predict: F-ISO2 still CLOSEABLE, F-META14 promoted to CLOSEABLE (method proven, extension is mechanical). M4 activation visible in orient output.

method.changes_since_s458: F-DEP1 RESOLVED, F-META8 RESOLVED (both closed S458). F-KNOW1 opened S461. F-ISO2 advanced to PARTIALLY CONFIRMED S457. F-RAND1 nearing measurement window end (S443+20=S463). F-EVAL1 criterion technically met (2.25/3 sustained).

F-ISO2.rationale: PARTIALLY CONFIRMED S457. 4 patterns, 3 predictions, ISO-26 candidate. Test: 3 predictions need n>0 validation.

F-META14.rationale: 40% non-current found in L-001..L-030. Method proven. Extension to L-031..L-060 is mechanical (same methodology). Genesis-era boundary identified (Sharpe 4.7 vs modern 7.8).

F-RAND1.rationale: Gini=0.473 baseline S443. 6 mechanisms deployed. Window S443-S463 closing. Need Gini remeasurement.

F-EVAL1.rationale: 2.25/3 sustained S403-S409. Glass ceiling identified. Test criterion 'sustain 2.25/3+' arguably MET but 'without external grounding' clause unresolved.

F-KNOW1.rationale: Opened S461. 1 experiment. Needs 10 sessions per test criteria.

F-META15.rationale: Baseline measured S393. randomness_probe.py deployed. Need 20-session surprise_rate measurement.

F119.rationale: 41/41 PASS but I9 requires ongoing monitoring not one-time test.

F126.rationale: v0.4. 10 ISO entries. ~40 more hubs needed.

F-AGI1.rationale: 5 gaps identified. Needs autonomous loop deployment.

F-COMP1.rationale: Zero external output after 40+ sessions. Structural diagnosis S459.

actual: 2 CLOSEABLE (F-ISO2 10/10, F-META14 8/10). 2 APPROACHING (F-RAND1 7/10 — window closing S463, F-EVAL1 6/10). F-META14 promoted from MEDIUM: method proven, extension mechanical. orient.py wired with section_closeable_frontiers. M4 advisory now visible at session start.
diff: Expected F-ISO2 still CLOSEABLE: CONFIRMED. Expected F-META14 promoted: CONFIRMED (7->8). orient.py wiring: DONE. Net CLOSEABLE decreased 3->2 because 2 were actually RESOLVED via M4 in S458 — M4 is working as designed.
lesson_candidate: M4 depletion rate: 2/3 CLOSEABLE resolved in 4 sessions (S458-S462). At this rate, closeable supply is consumed faster than replenished. Need continuous classifier refresh or M3 feeding pipeline.
